importance for the 7th aspect of the planets.
Regarding the 3rd aspect
3rd sign :from the sign in which a planet is posited also
represents the opposite sign. fu the above chart Jupiter is in
Gemini (West). 3rd sign :from its position falls in Leo. is the sign
of the east. Therefore importance is given to the 3rd aspect.
Regarding the 9th sign aspect
9th from Gemini falls in Aquarius. That is also the West
sign. This is the importance of the 9th sign.
Regarding the 11th sign
Jupiter is in Gemini, which is the West. Aries the 11th sign
:from Gemini is in the opposite direction viz., the East. This brings
home the importance of the 11th House.
How to take the directional aspects?
